Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}...Just give me a minute... so I can... calm down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 20 5 117}The pain comes and goes... But I'll be fine once it passes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}The pain comes and goes... But I'll be all right once it passes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I... stopped taking my medicine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 3 25 25}It's not going to cure me anyway, right? It just eases my pain and suffering...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I know... It's only cutting down what time I have left...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}But, my medicine makes me drowsy, and if my hands go numb and shake, then I can't write...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 13 20 5 117}My medicine makes me drowsy, and if my hands go numb, then I can't write...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}The reason I haven't finished my story... is because I haven't found the meaning of my life yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I'll get absorbed in my writing... erase it... and then lose sight of how to reach the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}...When I'm with you, I can almost see it... It's because you've been here for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It seems like you might have given me a reason to finish...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I'm probably writing this book to find my own meaning in life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}And, if I do find it... If I do finish the story...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...I hope we have a little more time together, after that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kamiki smiled weakly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}That's it for today, but I hope to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Kamiki,[n]then headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
